Title: Susamajî hakuryoku!! Mita ka, Gokû no furu pâwâ
Actors: Masako Nozawa, Brice Armstrong, Kyle Hebert
Plot: Vegeta bails on Goku to follow Gohan and Krillin while Goku fights Captain Ginyu. Meanwhile, Bulma notices on the dragon radar that all of the dragon balls are together, and she decides to go after them.
